summary: Matrix source with poor sound quality; no musical details provided
review: The sole reviewer admits the matrix was a major mistake, describing it as junk and expressing a desire to delete all copies. No comments on the performance itself are given, and the release has since been re‑issued with a new matrix.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one highly negative review focusing on the terrible matrix; no performance information, so rating reflects poor recording quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer calls the matrix "junk" and a huge gaffe, indicating severe audio problems.
